case_title: PROVIDENT CREDIT UNION VS. ALEJANDRO GONZALEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-13-2020 CONTINUED TO JUL-15-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
